scripts.deploy: npm run build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://esunclasico.com --delete --cache-control 'public,max-age=31536000,immutable' --exclude 'index.html' && aws s3 cp dist/index.html s3://esunclasico.com/index.html --cache-control 'no-cache,no-store,must-revalidate' && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id EHHB37GQMBN0Y --paths '/*' --query 'Invalidation.Id' --output text
